candidates.bio: welcome to The Rose Salon, I specialize in blowouts and up-do's! If your looking for a beginning of week hairstyle to last all week, or an up-do for a special event i've got you covered!
I am originally from San Francisco. I have been doing hair for over 18 years. I love to stay current by continually updating my education via classes.

I have been doing hair professionally for the past 10+ years, but it has been a love of mine forever. I graduated with honors from the Aveda Institute Denver. Come on in and let me make your hair dreams real! I love creating either a 'to the scalp' blonde highlight or lived in blondes and specialize in grey coverage. I have been doing lash extensions for about 8 years and LOVE them. If you are looking for a solution to streamlining your daily beauty routine, look no further! Eyelash extensions are your solution!

I am a Colorado native who has been doing hair for 34 years. I love doing both woman's and men's cuts.......and i am confident and experienced with fades and flat tops! I also have 30 years of color and perm experience! Shoot me a text or give me a call to set up an appointment!

I am the owner of The Nail Spot, I am a Colorado native. I specialize in manicures, pedicures, and gel nails. I only buy products sold to professionals. I also use a copper bowl that is anti-microbial does not hold any bacteria. every implement that I use is sanitized and cleaned after each client.I take my sanitation very seriously, not not all nail techs and clients are compatible and that's OK! but if you like the one on one atmosphere a clean atmosphere and good conversation, then I'm your gal! please stop by or contact me on the web. Thank you.

Kiki's Hair Shop is a private salon studio located in Lafayette, Colorado, specializing in bespoke luxury blonde services and premium hair extensions. The salon is committed to delivering beautifully healthy hair through tailored solutions that reflect each client's individual style and lifestyle. As a Certified Great Lengths Keratin Bond, Bellami, and DreamCatchers Beaded Wefts Professional, expert extension services are available for all hair types, utilizing only the finest hair from over 25 premium vendors. Signature offerings include bespoke luxury blonde techniques, advanced blonding, custom hair extensions, and smoothing treatments. Every service is executed with precision and artistry in an exclusive one-on-one environment, ensuring a personalized experience without double bookings. Book your appointment online to experience the luxury and expertise that make Kiki's Hair Shop truly exceptional. SATURDAY HAIR EXTENSION APPOINTMENTS AVAILABLE ON REQUEST.

Sola has over 750 locations nationwide and is the home of over 20,000 independent, industry-leading beauty professionals.

Luxe + Lather | Studio 14 Michelle provides customized hair color, cuts, waxing, and skincare services. Our mission is to deliver exceptional service, personalized care, and elevated results in a modern, welcoming environment.

Rebecca is one of the many beauty care professionals at Sola Salons Lafayette, providing personalized services to clients in Studio 2. Sola has over 750 locations nationwide and is the home of over 20,000 independent, industry-leading beauty professionals.

Hey my name is Sean butler and I am a Licensed barber in Lafayette Colorado. I found my passion of barbering when I met a seasoned barber named JOVE in Los Angeles who inspired me to throw myself into this craft. I have now been cutting for over 7 years and received my barber license from Emily Griffith in downtown Denver in 2019. I have continued my education by enrolling in the Vic blends academy since 2019, barber josh op 1 year course and Amos academy by Julius Caesar. I look forward to servicing you and making you fresh!

Nikki is one of the many beauty care professionals at Sola Salons Lafayette, providing personalized services to clients in Studio 10. Sola has over 750 locations nationwide and is the home of over 20,000 independent, industry-leading beauty professionals.
